posts.author: BruceGabin (Bruce Gabin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I’m new to Monday.
I am trying to import leads into Monday from an Excel file.
Each time I do this the first column is named Lead and each row starts with the name Item.

I have tried importing my excel file and not naming my columns to match Monday’s columns then just match the columns during the Import Process.
I have also tried renaming my excel files columns to have a Lead, Status and Create a Contact.
The results are still the same all my rows have the first columns name as Lead and each row has the name of Item.
I have uploaded a screen shot to show what I am talking about.
What I am trying to do is have the first column display the Company Name as this is how we identify the leads we have.
I am happy to leave the column heading as Lead but I want to change the name Item for the actual company name.

Monday-Lead-question1543×181 28.5 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: In your excel file, what’s the first column? When importing, it asks you what you want the first column to be

posts.author: BruceGabin (Bruce Gabin)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the reply, I appreciate it, I managed to work it out.
